response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the reference lyrics for the song 'DIVE!' in Scene 2. Scene 1 (intro talk) had no reference lyrics and required manual transcription. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized reference lyrics and translation for Scene 2, adjusting for precise timing. Scene 1 was transcribed and translated manually from scratch. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly anchored to vocal starts (Rule 1). Applied aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions (Rule 2 & 3) during rapid lyrics and transitions to prevent cascading delays. Prioritized spoken vocals over visual text where they overlapped.

subtitles.original: 待ってた方はぜひ、メンバーシップの方に加入していただければと思います。
subtitles.english: For those of you who were waiting, please consider joining the membership.

subtitles.original: 今日ね、お昼ぐらいにメンバーの方が使えるスタンプも追加されましたので、
subtitles.english: Today, around noon, we added some stamps that members can use,

subtitles.original: ぜひコメント欄でよかったら使ってみてください。
subtitles.english: so please feel free to use them in the comments if you'd like.

subtitles.original: もうみんな使いたくてたまらない、アロワナスタンプとかが追加されてるんで、
subtitles.english: The Arowana stamps that everyone's been dying to use have been added,

subtitles.original: ぜひ皆さんでね、コメント欄いっぱいアロワナを泳がせてください。よろしくお願いします。
subtitles.english: so please fill the comment section with swimming Arowanas. Thank you!

subtitles.original: さあ、ということで。
subtitles.english: Alright then.

subtitles.original: お衣装、改めて新衣装なんですが、
subtitles.english: Regarding the outfit, once again, this is my new look,

subtitles.original: 今回、衣装の他にもですね、
subtitles.english: but this time, besides the outfit itself,

subtitles.original: ちょっとね、ひとつ、とあるものを作りましたよ！
subtitles.english: I've actually made something special!

subtitles.original: ま、楽曲中にもね、出てきたんですけれども。
subtitles.english: Well, it did make an appearance during the song earlier.

subtitles.original: じゃんじゃかじゃんじゃか、あ、逆、あ、あ、じゃーん！
subtitles.english: Ta-da, ta-da... Oh, wrong way... and ta-da!

subtitles.original: ステッキでございます！
subtitles.english: It's a stick!

subtitles.original: 素敵でございます！
subtitles.english: It's wonderful! (Suteki!)

subtitles.original: いいでしょう、これ。カッコいいでしょう。
subtitles.english: Isn't it great? It looks cool, right?

subtitles.original: 今回ね、特注で素敵、作っちゃった！
subtitles.english: I had this 'Suteki' custom-made for the occasion!

subtitles.original: しかも！これだけじゃないんですよ！
subtitles.english: And! That's not all!

subtitles.original: 見ててね。
subtitles.english: Watch this.

subtitles.original: らでんビーーーーーム！！
subtitles.english: Raden Beeeeeam!!

subtitles.original: うわあ！レーザービームだ！すごい！
subtitles.english: Whoa! A laser beam! Amazing!

subtitles.original: 今回ね、レーザービームを出せるようにしてもらいました。
subtitles.english: I had them set it up so I can fire a laser beam.

subtitles.original: もう大丈夫です。
subtitles.english: I'm okay now.

subtitles.original: 疲れちゃった。
subtitles.english: I'm worn out.

subtitles.original: いかん、今日ライブまだまだこれからですので、
subtitles.english: No, the live show is still just getting started,

subtitles.original: 体力は温存していかないと。
subtitles.english: I need to conserve my energy.

subtitles.original: でも今日は、自分の体力がもう空っぽになるまで、
subtitles.english: But today, until my energy is completely spent,

subtitles.original: 全力でライブするから、みんな応援よろしくね！
subtitles.english: I'll give it my all, so please keep supporting me!

subtitles.original: それでは、そろそろ、
subtitles.english: Well then, it's about time...

subtitles.original: 次の曲に行きたいと思います！
subtitles.english: ...to move on to the next song!

subtitles.original: さ、次の曲は何なのか、
subtitles.english: Now, what will the next song be,

subtitles.original: 重大発表とは何なのか、
subtitles.english: and what is this big announcement?

subtitles.original: わくわくしながら聞いてくださいね。
subtitles.english: Please look forward to it.

subtitles.original: そしてここからは、
subtitles.english: And from this point on,

subtitles.original: ゲストも登場します！
subtitles.english: guests will also be appearing!

subtitles.original: ゲストパートは収録になりますので、悪しからず。
subtitles.english: The guest segment is pre-recorded, so please keep that in mind.

subtitles.original: それでは、今宵はまだまだ始まったばかり、
subtitles.english: Well then, the night is still young,

subtitles.original: みんなで一緒に楽しみましょう！
subtitles.english: so let's all have a great time together!

subtitles.original: それでは、どうぞ！
subtitles.english: And now, here we go!

subtitles.original: そう高く
subtitles.english: Stretching so high,

subtitles.original: 果てなく
subtitles.english: without an end,

subtitles.original: 明日へと導くよ
subtitles.english: guiding the way to tomorrow,

subtitles.original: 私だけの光放ちたい
subtitles.english: I want to shine with my very own light,

subtitles.original: DIVE!
subtitles.english: DIVE!

subtitles.original: WOW WOW WOW WOW...
subtitles.english: WOW WOW WOW WOW...

subtitles.original: 自信なくして ただ心に鍵かけて
subtitles.english: Losing my confidence, I just locked up my heart,

subtitles.original: 響く自分の声に
subtitles.english: and to my own resounding voice,

subtitles.original: 耳塞いでた
subtitles.english: I had shut my ears.

subtitles.original: ホントはいつだってわかっていたんだよ
subtitles.english: But actually, I've always known it all along,

subtitles.original: 一番大切なものここにあること
subtitles.english: that the most important thing is right here.

subtitles.original: 無限に広がる宇宙(そら)迷わず進もう
subtitles.english: In the infinitely expanding sky, I'll advance without hesitation.

subtitles.original: Go! Fly!
subtitles.english: Go! Fly!

subtitles.original: Yes! So High!
subtitles.english: Yes! So High!

subtitles.original: 目を閉じて言い聞かせてみたってもう
subtitles.english: Even if I close my eyes and try to tell myself,

subtitles.original: カラダ中騒いでる止まらない Heart
subtitles.english: it's already clamoring inside my body, my Heart won't stop,

subtitles.original: 強く熱く…！！
subtitles.english: strongly and passionately...!!

subtitles.original: そう高く 果てなく抱きしめた
subtitles.english: Stretching so high, endlessly embracing the...

subtitles.original: 未来が軌跡になる
subtitles.english: ...future, it becomes a path.

subtitles.original: 生まれた思いが明日へと導くよ
subtitles.english: These newborn feelings will guide me to tomorrow,

subtitles.original: 私だけの光放ちたい DIVE！
subtitles.english: I want to shine with my very own light, DIVE!

subtitles.original: WOW WOW WOW WOW...
subtitles.english: WOW WOW WOW WOW...

subtitles.original: 誰のものでもない心に問いかけて
subtitles.english: Asking my heart that belongs to no one else,

subtitles.original: 選んだ道の先へとまっすぐに
subtitles.english: straight ahead on the path I've chosen.

subtitles.original: どんな時だって見失わないよ
subtitles.english: No matter when, I won't lose sight of it,

subtitles.original: 一番大切な場所を見つけたから
subtitles.english: because I've found the place most important to me.

subtitles.original: 遠回りでもいい胸張って進もう
subtitles.english: It's okay to take a detour, I'll move forward with pride.

subtitles.original: Louder! Sing!
subtitles.english: Louder! Sing!

subtitles.original: Louder!
subtitles.english: Louder!

subtitles.original: 不器用かなでも 傷ついたって構わないよ
subtitles.english: I might be clumsy, but I don't care if I get hurt,

subtitles.original: 曇りない気持ちで生きたい Pride
subtitles.english: I want to live with unclouded feelings, Pride,

subtitles.original: 私らしく…！！
subtitles.english: true to myself...!!

subtitles.original: 両手を広げて解き放した昨日が
subtitles.english: Spreading my arms, the 'yesterdays' I set free,

subtitles.original: 翼になる
subtitles.english: will become wings.

subtitles.original: 重ねた出会いが...
subtitles.english: These overlapping encounters...
